tasks.title: TUI: add “jump to task by ID” command (palette + input)
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/tui/events/palette.rs`: `PaletteCommand` enum has no “select task by ID” command.
`crates/ralph/src/tui/app.rs`: app tracks an `id_to_index` map and can rebuild it (`ensure_id_index_map`), which can back a jump-to-ID feature.
`docs/tui-task-management.md`: “Jump-to-ID” is listed as a suggested enhancement but is not implemented.
plan: Add a palette command and an input mode/overlay for entering a task ID (e.g., RQ-####).
Use the id->index cache to select the task and adjust scroll to keep it visible.
Handle missing/invalid IDs with a clear status message.
Add tests for successful jumps and failure modes.
Update `docs/tui-task-management.md` to document the new workflow.
Run `make ci`.

tasks.title: TUI: direct set-status/set-priority commands + optional auto-archive on terminal
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/tui/task_edit.rs`: task status and priority updates are currently “cycle” only (`cycle_status` / `cycle_priority`).
`crates/ralph/src/tui/app.rs`: archiving terminal tasks is a separate explicit command (`archive_terminal_tasks`).
`docs/tui-task-management.md`: notes the TUI requires a 2-step “set terminal status then archive” workflow and suggests auto-archive / direct set-status as improvements.
plan: Add palette commands for setting an explicit status (Draft/Todo/Doing/Done/Rejected) and priority (Critical/High/Medium/Low).
Implement explicit set operations (not cycling) using the queue edit APIs.
Add an optional prompt (or config toggle) to archive immediately when setting Done/Rejected.
Add tests for explicit set-status/set-priority and the auto-archive/prompt flow.
Update docs and help key reference accordingly.
Run `make ci`.

tasks.title: TUI: add a mode/status bar for discoverability (mode, dirty/save, filters)
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/tui/render/mod.rs`: base UI renders list+details plus a footer, but there is no dedicated header/status bar for current mode or save state.
`crates/ralph/src/tui/app.rs`: app tracks status like `dirty`, `save_error`, and `runner_active`, but most of it is not surfaced persistently in the UI.
plan: Add a compact header/status bar that shows current mode, selection, filters, and save/runner state.
Make the header responsive to terminal width (truncate long fields).
Add rendering tests for small and normal terminal widths.
Run `make ci`.

tasks.title: TUI: improve command palette matching (fuzzy scoring + better ordering)
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/tui/app.rs`: `palette_entries` filters commands via case-insensitive substring match only (`title.contains(q)`), with no scoring or ranking.
plan: Introduce a small fuzzy scoring/ranking for palette entries (keeping stable ordering when query is empty).
Sort entries by score and add tie-breakers for predictable results.
Add tests that lock in ranking behavior for common queries.
Run `make ci`.

tasks.title: Community: add `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` for public release
plan: Add `CONTRIBUTING.md` that describes local workflow (`make ci`), issue triage expectations, and release/testing norms.
Add `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` (pick a standard template and adjust contact points).
Link both from `README.md`.
Run `make ci`.
